metadata.description: Plugins and skills for development workflows, media management, and conversational alignment.

plugins.name: gitflow
plugins.description: Gitflow branching model: develop/main strategy, conventional commits, quality gate, tag-driven release automation, and push/PR workflow.

plugins.name: media-management
plugins.description: Process downloaded music purchases: extract, tag, import to Apple Music, stage to NAS.

plugins.name: dev-skills
plugins.description: Development workflow skills: project setup, code quality, review, debugging, backend, UI, and security patterns.

plugins.name: tech-skills
plugins.description: Language-specific development skills: Go and Java workflows, tooling, and patterns.

plugins.name: infra-skills
plugins.description: Infrastructure skills: GitHub repository setup, Terraform backend provisioning on AWS.

plugins.name: pause-skills
plugins.description: Conversational skills: guided elicitation and context checkpoints for alignment.

plugins.name: ynh
plugins.description: User skills for ynh: create harnesses, inspect projects, compress artifacts, validate, and set up team delegation.
